title: eryngium proliferum
intro: Eryngium proliferum, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. Eryngium proliferum is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
